RichText.Text: 1. care for a variety of animal species 2. promote the well-being of animals 3. contribute to the well-being of wild animals 4. promote environmental conservation 5. gain a wide range of insights into... 6. get involved in=be engaged in 7. be physically fit 8. be in good condition 9. affect your participation 10. a specific requirement for 11. arrange free activities 12. Their work locations are fixed. 13. positive properties of a plastic bag 14. a single-use bag 15. read a statement from the government 16. become the founder of .... found v. 创建，创办
1. 照顾多种动物物种 2. 促进动物福祉 3. 促进野生动物福祉 4. 推动/促进环境保护 5. 获得关于……的广泛见解 6. 参与 = 投身于 7. 身体健康 8. 身体状态良好 9. 影响你的参与 10. 对……的具体要求 11. 安排免费活动 12. 他们的工作地点是固定的。 13. 塑料袋的积极的特性 14. 一次性袋子 15. 阅读政府的声明 16. 成为……的创始人
